 {"id":"flywheel_gateway-04a","title":"Update conflicts routes to use canonical response envelope","description":"# Task: Update Conflicts Routes to Use Canonical Response Envelope

## Parent Epic
[Epic] API Response Structure Standardization (flywheel_gateway-tt0)

## Endpoints to Update

### 1. GET /conflicts (list)
- Use sendList()
- Object type for items: "conflict"

### 2. GET /conflicts/history
- Use sendList()
- Already has offset/limit pagination (will convert to cursor-based in pagination epic)

### 3. GET /conflicts/stats
- Object type: "conflict_stats"

### 4. GET /conflicts/config
- Object type: "alert_config"

### 5. PATCH /conflicts/config
- Object type: "alert_config"

### 6. GET /conflicts/:conflictId
- Object type: "conflict"
- Include links: self, resolve

### 7. POST /conflicts/:conflictId/resolve
- Object type: "conflict_resolution"
- Status: 200

### 8. POST /conflicts/check/reservation
- Object type: "conflict_check"

### 9. POST /conflicts/scan/git
- Object type: "git_scan_result"

### 10. POST /conflicts/scan/contention
- Object type: "contention_scan_result"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 10 endpoints use canonical envelope
- [ ] Lists use sendList()
- [ ] Error responses use wrapError
- [ ] Tests updated

## Dependencies
- Depends on: Create response wrapper utility functions (flywheel_gateway-3ib)

## Files to Modify
- `apps/gateway/src/routes/conflicts.ts`","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T15:04:24.244627604Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T17:43:10.654595607Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T17:43:10.654595607Z","close_reason":"Already implemented - routes use sendResource, sendList, sendNotFound, etc.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_gateway-04a","depends_on_id":"flywheel_gateway-3ib","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T04:27:23Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_gateway-0cg","title":"Implement analytics query caching layer","description":"## Task
Add an in-memory caching layer for analytics queries to reduce SQLite load and smooth dashboard refreshes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] QueryCache supports TTL + size cap
- [ ] Cache hit/miss metrics emitted
- [ ] Invalidation on agent event ingest
- [ ] Concurrency-safe for simultaneous requests

## Test Plan
- Unit: cache get/set/invalidate + TTL expiry
- Integration: analytics service uses cache correctly
- E2E: dashboard refresh does not re-query DB within TTL

## Logging
- Structured cache logs with key, ttl, hit/miss, and size

## Dependencies
None

## Estimated Complexity
Medium
